test.notes: Pre-existing test failures in approval.test.ts and reservation-request.test.ts - unrelated to milestone-2 (MockTimeSlotRepository missing, outdated mocks)

typecheck.notes: Many pre-existing type errors in whatsapp services, reservation tests, test mocks - unrelated to milestone-2

lint.notes: 197 problems (160 errors, 37 warnings) - many pre-existing in test files, generated files. Minor lint issues in milestone-2 files: PurchaseOrderNew.tsx (unused vars), PurchaseOrders.tsx (unused vars), Suppliers.tsx (unused vars), dashboard.suppliers.$id.tsx (unused vars)

fixFeaturesReviewed.summary: Implements supplier detail page at /dashboard/suppliers/:id with product associations, contact info, payment terms
Changed notes field from uuid() to text() in purchase-order-item.ts
Fixed supplier validation to use supplierRepository.findByIdAndProfile() instead of purchaseOrderRepository

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit rule: When creating foreign key relationships in API endpoints, always validate that the related entity exists using the correct repository. The validation contract testing should verify invalid foreign keys are rejected.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-3-purchase-order-api originally used wrong repository for supplier validation

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document data type conventions for common fields: notes should use text(), dates should use timestamp(), IDs should use uuid(). Workers should grep existing schema files before adding new fields.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-2-purchase-order-schema originally used uuid() for notes field
